failure_modes.cause: BPR set below required pressure, leading to potential overpressure
failure_modes.mitigation: Upgrade BPR to handle at least 62.8 bar

failure_modes.cause: Vapour pressure of solvent exceeds pump inlet pressure at T = 120°C
failure_modes.mitigation: Pressurise feed reservoir to 0.5 bar above vapour pressure

failure_modes.cause: Prolonged exposure to 120°C may degrade PFA components
failure_modes.mitigation: Regularly inspect and replace PFA components

single_points_of_failure: BPR valve — blockage stops all flow
validation_experiments: Run system at full operating conditions for 60 min; monitor pressure stability and check for leaks
Test BPR with water at 62.8 bar to ensure it can maintain required pressure
Conduct thermal cycling test on PFA components to assess durability at 120°C
